TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Yi-li-sa-pay yisešľäŤéČŤééÁôĹšłÄšłĖ == yu mahida a nikaudipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüś∂Į Yi-li-sa-pay u wawa ni Heng-li pase atu ci An-ni.Puo-lin a wawa, wina nida caay pilecuh tu tatamaan a wawa, ci Yi-li-sa-pay caay henay ka tuluay ku mihcaan Patayan. . Yi-li-sa-pay caylim lulu mihcaan siwa bulad pitu demiad lecuhan i Pu-la-sen sikusiya, ina kitidaan u pilecuhan ni ama nida atu ci nida, u padek tu nina nida ku lecuhan tu kakana ci Ma-li-ya yisean, hiyan nu bai ci Ye-ke a Yi-li-sa-pay atu wina nida a bai ci Yi-li-sa-pay. Huo-hua-de ku pinganganan. ci nida u In-ke-lan kuowan Heng-li pase sakatusa maudipay a wawaan, ci ian nida ci Heng-li a sakatusa nu acawa ci An-ni. Puo-lin. sisa nu ayawan ci Heng-li atu Yi-li-sa-pay a padekan nu inaan a kakana ci Ma-li wina nida ci A-la-kun a Kay-sa-lin a nipikikungan nai' ku kikasa sisa ci Ma-li a la'cus milaylay tu kawaw nu heni, sisa ci Yi-li-sa-pay lecuhan mala In-ke-lan tatadengaay milaylayay tina kawawan. . ci Heng-li siacawa ci An-nian u mukti u ngalay siwawa tu tatamaan a wawaan mamilaylay tu kawaw, kya milaylay tu kawaw nu wancaw a nikacaculukculuk. ci Yi-li-sa-pay i siwa a bulad cacaya bataan a demiad singlian, ci Kan-te'-puo-li ta-cu-ciw ci Tang-ma-se. Ke'-lan-may, Ay-si-te-huo-cie, Nuo-hu-ke'-kun-cie acawa atu Duo-say-te'-huo-cie-tay acawa kala wama atu wina ku pacabayay misingli. . caylim lunem mihcaan lima bulad caysiw demiad, ci ina ni Yi-li-sa-pay i tusaay a mihcaan ku walu a buladan patayan, ci A-la-ku a Kay-sa-lin itida tu sepatay nu buladan a mapatay. ci Yi-li-sa-pay hapuhan u bucud a tataynaan a wawa han, sipakayda i nisilsilan tu wanwi inai' ku ngangan. ci An-ni.Puo-lin patayan tu caycay a dimiadan, siacawaaca ci Heng-li ci Cen. Si-muo. Cen. Si-muo i caylim lupic mihcaan lecuhan ci Ay-de-hua caay ka tenes mapataytu. nipilecuhan ni Ay-de-hua tatenga u mamilaylay tu kawaw nu luma', ci Yi-li-sa-pay alaen nida ku dikuc tayda i kiwkay misingli. 1536ŚĻī5śúą19śó•, . saydan ni Yi-li-sa-pay ci Ma-ke-li-te'.Pu-lay-n misulit satu, ci nida " hatidatu ku dawmi', siligiaca, mahida u udip nida, caay henay kaku pakaadih tu mahiniay a wawa". caylim lupic tu laludan, ci Te'-luo-yi a acawa ci Pu'-lan-ci. He'-puo-te' ku midiputay ci Yi-li-sa-payan, malasaydan nida i luma' katukuh tu caylim siplim mihcaan tu hedek atu caylim sipnem mihcaan tu lingatu mituysiw. na dikudan na mikikun ci Kay-sa-lin. "Kay-te'".A-se-li katinengan nu tademaw ci Kay-sa-lin. Cen-puo-naw-n itida i caylimlupic mihcaan malasaydan nu luma' ci Yi-li-sa-pay, caylim nemlim mihcaan amapatay tu nuayawan malacabay tu atu ci Yi-li-sa-pay, nikuda ci Pu-lan-ci. Pa'-li pala kalung han tu nida i luma' nida. . kasikadan a katuuday, nikapatayan ni kakana aku malalum kaku, tungus a tamudungen nu maku, mabiyalaw kaku, nida, nipabeli nu paudipay kuyniyan, apasiketan tu nida a kawaw, mikilul tu ni pabeli nida a wawawan. makabalucuay nu makau mangalay kaku miduduc tu kawaw nida, tu nipabeli nu paudipay a sapikawawan, taneng mapaedap nu paudipay i takuwan. . kapatayanťÄĚšłĖ ci Yi-li-sa-pay cayay hen pikikun, nikapatay nida mihedektu tu Du-yi wancaw. tunika tuas nida, nai' henay ku wantan nida tu midaydayay a tademaw, pasayda tu i iluc nida miadih, nipatayan nida a Su-ke-lan-ma-li a wawa ci Cen-mu-se. nika caay henay pangangani ci nida tu sapilaylayan nu tademw. . caynem seplu mihcaan lu bulad tusip demiad kapatayan i Sa-li- niyaduan a Li-ci-mun tahudan nu lumaan. tademen i Lun-tun-si-min kiwkay. milaylayay tu kawaw nida ci Cen-mu-se tawya malaSu-ke-lan a Cen-mu-se luose. tawya u In-ke-lan atu Su-ke-lan cacaytu ku tahudan nu sakakaay, malingatu tu Pu-lei-ten palecad a sayaway nu Wan-se, nika In-ke-lan atu Su-ke-lan nina tusaay a kanatalan kawaw nu sihu nida ku nida a kawawan. kapatayan nida tu lima a bataan nu nikudan, malepacaw ku labuay nu kanatal, ci Aw-li-fuo.Ke'lu-wi-e mipatay tu kuo-wan, saan midiputay kaku tu kanatalan a bakian sa, u In-kuo malasaapuyuay a In-ci-li-kun-he-kuo. 1603ŚĻī3śúą24 . kalalidan atu sausiŚĹĪťüŅŚíĆŤ©ēŚÉĻ ci Yi-li-sa-pay u In-kuo likisian u sakanamuhan a tahudan. tusep septu mihcaan, u BBC musakamuay tu binacadan a nipipilian " nu cacay a lasubuan nu palawinaan i In-kuo a tademaw", ci Yi-li-sa-pay sakapitu ku ngangan nida, milakuuyt tu dayday nu tahudan. tusep seplim mihcaan, itini i likisian nu tilibian a nipikilukan "sasawinaan nu tahudan a Cun-cu" likisi atu misiluday a tademaw mikenih tu sabaw tusa nu In-kuo cun-cu Patinsu, ci Yi-li-sa-pay midemec makaala tu satalakaway nu tinsu sipwal ku tisuan. BBC 48ŚąÜ.
S.PHON: == ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj jis…ô****** == ju mańßida a nikaudip**** ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj u wawa ni ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi pas…ô atu ¶i an-ni.puo-r~…ĺin a wawa, wina nida ¶aaj pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu tatamaan a wawa, ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka tur~…ĺuaj ku mińß ¶aan patajan. . ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶ajr~…ĺim r~…ĺur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i pu-r~…ĺa-s…ôn sikusija, ina kitidaan u pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ama nida atu ¶i nida, u pad…ôk tu nina nida ku r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu kakana ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja jis…ôan, ńßijan nu bai ¶i j…ô-k…ô a ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj atu wina nida a bai ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj. ńßuo-ńßua-d…ô ku piŇčaŇčanan. ¶i nida u in-k…ô-r~…ĺan kuowan ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi pas…ô sakatusa maudipaj a wawaan, ¶i ian nida ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi a sakatusa nu a ¶awa ¶i an-ni. puo-r~…ĺin. sisa nu ajawan ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi atu ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj a pad…ôkan nu inaan a kakana ¶i ma-r~…ĺi wina nida ¶i a-r~…ĺa-kun a kaj-sa-r~…ĺin a nipikikuŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku kikasa sisa ¶i ma-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawaw nu ńß…ôni, sisa ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan mar~…ĺa in-k…ô-r~…ĺan tatad…ôŇčaaj mir~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj tina kawawan. . ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi sia ¶awa ¶i an-nian u mukti u Ňčar~…ĺaj siwawa tu tatamaan a wawaan mamir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawaw, kja mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawaw nu wan ¶aw a nika ¶a ¶ur~…ĺuk ¶ur~…ĺuk. ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj i siwa a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aja bataan a d…ômiad siŇčr~…ĺian, ¶i kan-t…ô Ē~ °-puo-r~…ĺi ta- ¶u- ¶iw ¶i taŇč-ma-s…ô. k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan-maj, aj-si-t…ô-ńßuo- ¶i…ô, nuo-ńßu-k…ô Ē~ °-kun- ¶i…ô a ¶awa atu duo-saj-t…ô Ē~ °-ńßuo- ¶i…ô-taj a ¶awa kar~…ĺa wama atu wina ku pa ¶abajaj misiŇčr~…ĺi. . ¶ajr~…ĺim r~…ĺun…ôm mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad, ¶i ina ni ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj i tusaaj a mińß ¶aan ku war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺadan patajan, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-ku a kaj-sa-r~…ĺin itida tu s…ôpataj nu bur~…ĺadan a mapataj. ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ńßapuńßan u bu ¶ud a tatajnaan a wawa ńßan, sipakajda i nisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan tu wanwi inai Ē~ ° ku ŇčaŇčan. ¶i an-ni.puo-r~…ĺin patajan tu ¶aj ¶aj a dimiadan, sia ¶awaa ¶a ¶i ńß…ôŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i ¶…ôn. si-muo. ¶…ôn. si-muo i ¶ajr~…ĺim r~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i aj-d…ô-ńßua ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mapatajtu. nipir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni aj-d…ô-ńßua tat…ôŇča u mamir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu kawaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ar~…ĺa…ôn nida ku diku ¶ tajda i kiwkaj misiŇčr~…ĺi. **********, . sajdan ni ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ °.pu-r~…ĺaj-n misur~…ĺit satu, ¶i nida " ńßatidatu ku dawmi Ē~ °, sir~…ĺigia ¶a, mańßida u udip nida, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaku pakaadińß tu mańßiniaj a wawa". ¶ajr~…ĺim r~…ĺupi ¶ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺudan, ¶i t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-ji a a ¶awa ¶i pu Ē~ °-r~…ĺan- ¶i. ńß…ô Ē~ °-puo-t…ô Ē~ ° ku midiputaj ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-pajan, mar~…ĺasajdan nida i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° katukuńß tu ¶ajr~…ĺim sipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan tu ńß…ôd…ôk atu ¶ajr~…ĺim sipn…ôm mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺiŇčatu mitujsiw. na dikudan na mikikun ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin. "kaj-t…ô Ē~ °".a-s…ô-r~…ĺi katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin. ¶…ôn-puo-naw-n itida i ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺasajdan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj, ¶ajr~…ĺim n…ômr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan amapataj tu nuajawan mar~…ĺa ¶abaj tu atu ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj, nikuda ¶i pu-r~…ĺan- ¶i. pa Ē~ °-r~…ĺi par~…ĺa kar~…ĺuŇč ńßan tu nida i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nida. . kasikadan a katuudaj, nikapatajan ni kakana aku mar~…ĺar~…ĺum kaku, tuŇčus a tamuduŇč…ôn nu maku, mabijar~…ĺaw kaku, nida, nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu paudipaj kujnijan, apasik…ôtan tu nida a kawaw, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ni pab…ôr~…ĺi nida a wawawan. makabar~…ĺu ¶uaj nu makau maŇčar~…ĺaj kaku midudu ¶ tu kawaw nida, tu nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu paudipaj a sapikawawan, tan…ôŇč mapa…ôdap nu paudipaj i takuwan. . kapatajan** ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶ajaj ńß…ôn pikikun, nikapataj nida mińß…ôd…ôktu tu du-ji wan ¶aw. tunika tuas nida, nai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan nida tu midajdajaj a tad…ômaw, pasajda tu i ir~…ĺu ¶ nida miadińß, nipatajan nida a su-k…ô-r~…ĺan-ma-r~…ĺi a wawa ¶i ¶…ôn-mu-s…ô. nika ¶aaj ńß…ônaj paŇčaŇčani ¶i nida tu sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺajan nu tad…ômw. . ¶ajn…ôm s…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad tusip d…ômiad kapatajan i sa-r~…ĺi- nijaduan a r~…ĺi- ¶i-mun tańßudan nu r~…ĺumaan. tad…ôm…ôn i r~…ĺun-tun-si-min kiwkaj. mir~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj tu kawaw nida ¶i ¶…ôn-mu-s…ô tawja mar~…ĺasu-k…ô-r~…ĺan a ¶…ôn-mu-s…ô r~…ĺuos…ô. tawja u in-k…ô-r~…ĺan atu su-k…ô-r~…ĺan ¶a ¶ajtu ku tańßudan nu sakakaaj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pu-r~…ĺ…ôi-t…ôn par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a sajawaj nu wan-s…ô, nika in-k…ô-r~…ĺan atu su-k…ô-r~…ĺan nina tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺan kawaw nu sińßu nida ku nida a kawawan. kapatajan nida tu r~…ĺima a bataan nu nikudan, mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ku r~…ĺabuaj nu kanatar~…ĺ, ¶i aw-r~…ĺi-fuo.k…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺu-wi-…ô mipataj tu kuo-wan, saan midiputaj kaku tu kanatar~…ĺan a bakian sa, u in-kuo mar~…ĺasaapujuaj a in- ¶i-r~…ĺi-kun-ńß…ô-kuo. ********* . kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan atu sausi***** ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj u in-kuo r~…ĺikisian u sakanamuńßan a tańßudan. tus…ôp s…ôptu mińß ¶aan, u bb ¶ musakamuaj tu bina ¶adan a nipipir~…ĺian " nu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan nu par~…ĺawinaan i in-kuo a tad…ômaw", ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj sakapitu ku ŇčaŇčan nida, mir~…ĺakuujt tu dajdaj nu tańßudan. tus…ôp s…ôpr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, itini i r~…ĺikisian nu tir~…ĺibian a nipikir~…ĺukan "sasawinaan nu tańßudan a ¶un- ¶u" r~…ĺikisi atu misir~…ĺudaj a tad…ômaw mik…ônińß tu sabaw tusa nu in-kuo ¶un- ¶u patinsu, ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj mid…ôm…ô ¶ makaar~…ĺa tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu tinsu sipwar~…ĺ ku tisuan. bb ¶ ***.
S.FORM: == Yi-li-sa-pay yisešľäŤéČŤééÁôĹšłÄšłĖ == yu mahida a nikaudipśó©ŚĻīÁĒüś∂Į Yi-li-sa-pay u wawa ni Heng-li pase atu ci An-ni.Puo-lin a wawa, wina nida caay pilecuh tu tatamaan a wawa, ci Yi-li-sa-pay caay henay ka tuluay ku mihcaan Patayan. . Yi-li-sa-pay caylim lulu mihcaan siwa bulad pitu demiad lecuhan i Pu-la-sen sikusiya, ina kitidaan u pilecuhan ni ama nida atu ci nida, u padek tu nina nida ku lecuhan tu kakana ci Ma-li-ya yisean, hiyan nu bai ci Ye-ke a Yi-li-sa-pay atu wina nida a bai ci Yi-li-sa-pay. Huo-hua-de ku pinganganan. ci nida u In-ke-lan kuowan Heng-li pase sakatusa maudipay a wawaan, ci ian nida ci Heng-li a sakatusa nu acawa ci An-ni. Puo-lin. sisa nu ayawan ci Heng-li atu Yi-li-sa-pay a padekan nu inaan a kakana ci Ma-li wina nida ci A-la-kun a Kay-sa-lin a nipikikungan nai' ku kikasa sisa ci Ma-li a la'cus milaylay tu kawaw nu heni, sisa ci Yi-li-sa-pay lecuhan mala In-ke-lan tatadengaay milaylayay tina kawawan. . ci Heng-li siacawa ci An-nian u mukti u ngalay siwawa tu tatamaan a wawaan mamilaylay tu kawaw, kya milaylay tu kawaw nu wancaw a nikacaculukculuk. ci Yi-li-sa-pay i siwa a bulad cacaya bataan a demiad singlian, ci Kan-te'-puo-li ta-cu-ciw ci Tang-ma-se. Ke'-lan-may, Ay-si-te-huo-cie, Nuo-hu-ke'-kun-cie acawa atu Duo-say-te'-huo-cie-tay acawa kala wama atu wina ku pacabayay misingli. . caylim lunem mihcaan lima bulad caysiw demiad, ci ina ni Yi-li-sa-pay i tusaay a mihcaan ku walu a buladan patayan, ci A-la-ku a Kay-sa-lin itida tu sepatay nu buladan a mapatay. ci Yi-li-sa-pay hapuhan u bucud a tataynaan a wawa han, sipakayda i nisilsilan tu wanwi inai' ku ngangan. ci An-ni.Puo-lin patayan tu caycay a dimiadan, siacawaaca ci Heng-li ci Cen. Si-muo. Cen. Si-muo i caylim lupic mihcaan lecuhan ci Ay-de-hua caay ka tenes mapataytu. nipilecuhan ni Ay-de-hua tatenga u mamilaylay tu kawaw nu luma', ci Yi-li-sa-pay alaen nida ku dikuc tayda i kiwkay misingli. 1536ŚĻī5śúą19śó•, . saydan ni Yi-li-sa-pay ci Ma-ke-li-te'.Pu-lay-n misulit satu, ci nida " hatidatu ku dawmi', siligiaca, mahida u udip nida, caay henay kaku pakaadih tu mahiniay a wawa". caylim lupic tu laludan, ci Te'-luo-yi a acawa ci Pu'-lan-ci. He'-puo-te' ku midiputay ci Yi-li-sa-payan, malasaydan nida i luma' katukuh tu caylim siplim mihcaan tu hedek atu caylim sipnem mihcaan tu lingatu mituysiw. na dikudan na mikikun ci Kay-sa-lin. "Kay-te'".A-se-li katinengan nu tademaw ci Kay-sa-lin. Cen-puo-naw-n itida i caylimlupic mihcaan malasaydan nu luma' ci Yi-li-sa-pay, caylim nemlim mihcaan amapatay tu nuayawan malacabay tu atu ci Yi-li-sa-pay, nikuda ci Pu-lan-ci. Pa'-li pala kalung han tu nida i luma' nida. . kasikadan a katuuday, nikapatayan ni kakana aku malalum kaku, tungus a tamudungen nu maku, mabiyalaw kaku, nida, nipabeli nu paudipay kuyniyan, apasiketan tu nida a kawaw, mikilul tu ni pabeli nida a wawawan. makabalucuay nu makau mangalay kaku miduduc tu kawaw nida, tu nipabeli nu paudipay a sapikawawan, taneng mapaedap nu paudipay i takuwan. . kapatayanťÄĚšłĖ ci Yi-li-sa-pay cayay hen pikikun, nikapatay nida mihedektu tu Du-yi wancaw. tunika tuas nida, nai' henay ku wantan nida tu midaydayay a tademaw, pasayda tu i iluc nida miadih, nipatayan nida a Su-ke-lan-ma-li a wawa ci Cen-mu-se. nika caay henay pangangani ci nida tu sapilaylayan nu tademw. . caynem seplu mihcaan lu bulad tusip demiad kapatayan i Sa-li- niyaduan a Li-ci-mun tahudan nu lumaan. tademen i Lun-tun-si-min kiwkay. milaylayay tu kawaw nida ci Cen-mu-se tawya malaSu-ke-lan a Cen-mu-se luose. tawya u In-ke-lan atu Su-ke-lan cacaytu ku tahudan nu sakakaay, malingatu tu Pu-lei-ten palecad a sayaway nu Wan-se, nika In-ke-lan atu Su-ke-lan nina tusaay a kanatalan kawaw nu sihu nida ku nida a kawawan. kapatayan nida tu lima a bataan nu nikudan, malepacaw ku labuay nu kanatal, ci Aw-li-fuo.Ke'lu-wi-e mipatay tu kuo-wan, saan midiputay kaku tu kanatalan a bakian sa, u In-kuo malasaapuyuay a In-ci-li-kun-he-kuo. 1603ŚĻī3śúą24 . kalalidan atu sausiŚĹĪťüŅŚíĆŤ©ēŚÉĻ ci Yi-li-sa-pay u In-kuo likisian u sakanamuhan a tahudan. tusep septu mihcaan, u BBC musakamuay tu binacadan a nipipilian " nu cacay a lasubuan nu palawinaan i In-kuo a tademaw", ci Yi-li-sa-pay sakapitu ku ngangan nida, milakuuyt tu dayday nu tahudan. tusep seplim mihcaan, itini i likisian nu tilibian a nipikilukan "sasawinaan nu tahudan a Cun-cu" likisi atu misiluday a tademaw mikenih tu sabaw tusa nu In-kuo cun-cu Patinsu, ci Yi-li-sa-pay midemec makaala tu satalakaway nu tinsu sipwal ku tisuan. BBC 48ŚąÜ.

ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka tur~…ĺuaj ku mińß ¶aan patajan. . ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ¶ajr~…ĺim r~…ĺur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i pu-r~…ĺa-s…ôn sikusija, ina kitidaan u pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni ama nida atu ¶i nida, u pad…ôk tu nina nida ku r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan tu kakana ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja jis…ôan, ńßijan nu bai ¶i j…ô-k…ô a ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj atu wina nida a bai ¶i ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj.
